tasks.title: Set up Telegram bot with grammY and long polling
Implement SQLite database schema for users, events, duels, predictions, stakes, and reputation
Create resolver job to auto-resolve duels based on event outcomes
Implement per-chat state machine for user flows (idle → new_duel → ... → confirming)
Handle user registration/authentication via Telegram /start command
Implement /newduel flow: event type selection, search, title/description/deadline/outcomes setup
Implement /predict flow: outcome selection, stake confirmation, prediction locking
Implement /duels command and duel card rendering with filters and pagination
Implement /leaderboard command and reputation score tracking with v_leaderboard view
Implement admin-only /admin_resolve and /admin_event commands for manual resolution/event management
Integrate crypto price API (CoinGecko) for resolving crypto-related events
Integrate sports API (API-Sports) for resolving sports match outcomes
Integrate weather API (OpenWeatherMap) for resolving weather-based events
